code: import{useState}from"react";import axios from"axios";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const API="https://your-backend.onrender.com/api/jobs";function Admin(){const[job,setJob]=useState({});const addJob=async()=>{const pass=prompt("Enter Admin Password");await axios.post(API,{...job,adminPass:pass});alert("Job Added");};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Admin"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{placeholder:"Title",onChange:e=>setJob({...job,title:e.target.value})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{placeholder:"Company",onChange:e=>setJob({...job,company:e.target.value})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{placeholder:"Location",onChange:e=>setJob({...job,location:e.target.value})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{placeholder:"Category",onChange:e=>setJob({...job,category:e.target.value})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{placeholder:"Description",onChange:e=>setJob({...job,description:e.target.value})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{placeholder:"Apply Link",onChange:e=>setJob({...job,applyLink:e.target.value})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:addJob,children:"Add Job"})]});}export default Admin;
